name: portal
visual_summary: The portal component provides a container for rendering children outside a DOM element. It is used for scenarios such as dialogs and tooltips where a custom positioning is required. A developer would use it for creating overlays with custom positioning.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: portal
Description: The portal component provides a container for rendering children outside a DOM element. It is used for scenarios such as dialogs and tooltips where a custom positioning is required. A developer would use it for creating overlays with custom positioning.
Style: 
Interactions: custom-positionable
Tags: overlay, dialog, positioning

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
